name: cpig-render-02-tape-sphere
description: Control test: does a STRUCTURAL (tape) CPig field render in the in-process GLSL conduit? CPigSphere exports as a libfive TAPE atom (not a voxel grid), so this isolates whether the blank mesh→field (grid/u_sdfGrid path) is grid-specific or a global conduit/shader failure. _SelAll _Delete → _CPigSphere 0,0,0 10 (auto-displays) → WaitForPenumbraFrame → capture. No source mesh to hide (tape field). Blank-doc launch (no Grasshopper, no flake).

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D ray-marched signed-distance sphere (a smooth solid ball) drawn into the Rhino viewport. NOT an empty grey viewport, NOT a wireframe box.

checkpoints.name: cpig-tape-sphere-render
checkpoints.description: One ray-marched SDF sphere (tape path) near the origin — solid, not empty.
